name: 17 · Stream Map
description: Scatter fan-out over a streaming Control channel (docs/25). A producer AutomatedStep declares a Control/Out channel 'items' (contract=Scatter, max_fanout=8) and scatters 4 words (the/quick/brown/fox), one control emission per word. The channel's gather barrier re-orders the fan-out by emit index into a single `{ output: [...] }` collection, wired (sourceHandle 'items') straight into a joiner that uppercases and concatenates the words in stream order into 'THE QUICK BROWN FOX'.
